title: ASR Outdoor 1000 Lumen Zoom Rechargeable Pivoting Headlamp 3 Stage Light
description:
Ever ended up stuck in the dark at camp or at the end of a long day post-trek? We have, and it admittedly happens to all of us at some point. Nevertheless, it’s easily avoidable by adding the ASR Outdoor 10 Watt LED 1000-Lumen Rechargeable Headlamp to your arsenal of outdoor activity gear, survival or emergency preparedness kits and much more. Suitable for walking or running, cycling, reading, climbing, hiking, camping, hunting, fishing, tactical purposes, craft and hobby projects, and is a must-have to include with your camping gear, fishing gear, hiking backpacks, and camping accessories so you’ll never be left without light again

ASR Outdoor 1000 Lumen Zoom Rechargeable Pivoting Headlamp 3 Stage Light

Ever ended up stuck in the dark at camp or at the end of a long day post-trek? We have, and it admittedly happens to all of us at some point. Nevertheless, it’s easily avoidable by adding the ASR Outdoor 10 Watt LED 1000-Lumen Rechargeable Headlamp to your arsenal of outdoor activity gear, survival or emergency preparedness kits and much more.

Key Features

  • RECHARGEABLE HEADLAMP: 2000mAh Lithium Batteries. Hiking, camping, fishing, cycling or working on craft or hobby projects, never get stuck in the dark again with the ASR Outdoor rechargeable headlamp with up to 20 hours of bright light; UL Certified Batteries and USB charging cable included
  • SWITCHABLE BRIGHTNESS MODES: The ASR Outdoor rechargeable headlamp can switch between three different brightness modes including low beam, high beam and strobe, depending on your activity; low beam mode will give you 7 hours of battery life, high beam mode 3.5 hours and strobe mode 20 hours
  • ZOOM CAPABILITY: Featuring easy zoom adjustments, you can adjust outwards for a focused beam or adjust inwards for wider beam depending on activity or project; the rechargeable headlamp light also pivots for directional illumination
  • ADJUSTABLE: Whether you’re hiking, camping, fishing or working on home, craft or hobby projects, the ASR Outdoor rechargeable headlamp features a contoured forehead plate and adjustable straps to ensure a comfortable position for your head and reduce any potential neck fatigue
  • MULTIFUNCTIONAL: This rechargeable headlamp is suitable for walking or running, cycling, reading, climbing, hiking, camping, hunting, fishing, tactical purposes, craft and hobby projects and a must-have to include with camping gear, fishing gear, hiking backpacks, camping accessories, survival kits and more

Product Specifications

  • MPN: RLZH
  • UPC: 060886429074
  • Color: Black

Suitable for walking or running, cycling, reading, climbing, hiking, camping, hunting, fishing, tactical purposes, craft and hobby projects, and is a must-have to include with your camping gear, fishing gear, hiking backpacks, and camping accessories so you’ll never be left without light again.

The ASR Outdoor 1000 Lumen 3 Stage Switch Zoom Rechargeable Pivoting Headlamp is an ASR Outdoor essential and must-have safety item for hiking, trekking, fishing, cycling, hunting, running, walking, climbing or curling up a good book on your next camping trip. Easy to pack in your camping gear or hiking backpack, we don’t leave the house without it.
